# tz-locations

> Complete Tanzania location data — 31 regions, 168 districts, 4,054 wards, 75,061 streets with postcodes.

Two interfaces: a REST API (Cloudflare Workers + D1) and an offline npm package (`tz-locations`).

## REST API

Base URL: https://tz-locations-api.mwemanoor.workers.dev

All responses use `{ data, meta }` envelope. Errors: `{ error: { code, message } }`.
Rate limit: 100 requests/minute. CORS enabled.

### Endpoints

- GET /v1/regions — List all 31 regions. Returns: Region[]
- GET /v1/regions/:slug — Get single region by slug. Returns: Region
- GET /v1/regions/:slug/districts — List districts in a region. Returns: District[]
- GET /v1/districts/:slug — Get single district by slug. Returns: District
- GET /v1/districts/:slug/wards — List wards in a district. Returns: Ward[]
- GET /v1/wards/:slug — Get single ward with postcode. Returns: Ward
- GET /v1/wards/:slug/streets — List streets in a ward. Returns: Street[]
- GET /v1/streets/:id — Get single street by numeric ID. Returns: Street
- GET /v1/postcodes/:postcode — Lookup by 5-digit postcode. Returns: { ward: Ward, streets: Street[] }
- GET /v1/search?q=&type=&limit= — Full-text search (FTS5). Query params: q (required), type (region|district|ward|street), limit (default 20, max 100)
- GET /v1/autocomplete?q=&limit= — Prefix autocomplete. Query params: q (required, min 2 chars), limit (default 10)
- GET /v1/stats — Counts per location level. Returns: { regions, districts, wards, streets }

### Types

Region: { name: string, slug: string }
District: { name: string, slug: string, region_slug: string }
Ward: { name: string, slug: string, district_slug: string, region_slug: string, postcode: string }
Street: { id: number, name: string, postcode: string, ward_slug: string, district_slug: string, region_slug: string }

## npm Package

Package: tz-locations
Install: npm install tz-locations

### Functions

- getRegions(): Region[] — All 31 regions
- getRegion(slug: string): Region | undefined — Single region by slug
- getDistricts(regionSlug?: string): District[] — All districts or filtered by region
- getDistrictsByRegion(slug: string): District[] — Districts in a region
- getDistrict(slug: string): District | undefined — Single district by slug
- getWards(regionSlug?: string, districtSlug?: string): Ward[] — All wards or filtered
- getWardsByDistrict(regionSlug: string, districtSlug: string): Ward[] — Wards in a district
- getWard(slug: string): Ward | undefined — Single ward by slug
- getStreets(regionSlug: string, districtSlug: string, wardSlug: string): Street[] — Streets in a ward
- getByPostcode(postcode: string): PostcodeLookupResult — Lookup by 5-digit postcode
- searchLocations(query: string, options?: { type?: string, limit?: number }): Location[] — Search by name
- getStats(): { regions: number, districts: number, wards: number, streets: number } — Counts

### TypeScript Types

Region: { name: string, slug: string }
District: { name: string, slug: string, region_slug: string }
Ward: { name: string, slug: string, district_slug: string, region_slug: string }
Street: { name: string, postcode: string, ward_slug: string, district_slug: string, region_slug: string }
Location: { type: 'region' | 'district' | 'ward' | 'street', name: string, slug?: string, postcode?: string, ward_slug?: string, district_slug?: string, region_slug?: string }
PostcodeLookupResult: { ward: Ward | null, streets: Street[] }

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/mwemanoor/tz-locations
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/tz-locations
- Documentation: https://tz-locations-docs.pages.dev
